ecarx.carext.update.ota

Interface IOta

  • All Superinterfaces:
    BaseAPI

    public interface IOta
extends BaseAPI
    This class provides the API for accessing ota functionality.
    Since:
    5

    • Nested Class Summary

      • Nested classes/interfaces inherited from interface ecarx.carext.base.BaseAPI

        BaseAPI.Callback

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Default Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      default void checkVersionUpdate()
      Homepage check for version updates.
      default VersionInfo getCurrentVersion()
      Returns current version.
      default void getCurrentVersion(BaseCallBack<VersionInfo> callback)
      Async get current version.
      default IOtaDownload getDownloadManager()
      Returns a manager used to accessing ota download functionality.
      default FunctionStatus getFunctionStatus()
      Get current function status.
      default void getHistoryVersionDetailInfo(java.lang.String versionName, BaseCallBack<VersionInfo> callback)
      Async get single historical version details.
      default IOtaInstall getInstallManager()
      Returns a manager used to accessing ota install functionality.
      default IOtaInstallErrorRepair getRepairInstallManager()
      Returns a manager used to repair error of ota install.
      default VersionInfo getTargetVersion()
      Returns an updated version.
      default boolean registerVersionListener(VersionListener listener)
      Register an observer to obtain version change event.
      default boolean requestHistoryVersionInfo()
      Request the list of history version info VersionListener.onHistoryVersionInfo(List).
      default void setUpdateTaskUuid(java.lang.String taskUuid)
      Set the UUID for this update task.
      default void unregisterVersionListener(VersionListener listener)
      Unregister the observer.

      • Methods inherited from interface ecarx.carext.base.BaseAPI

        init, onRelease

    • Method Detail

      • getFunctionStatus

        @NonNull
 @RequiresPermission(value="ecarx.openapi.permission.ACCESS_OTA")
default FunctionStatus getFunctionStatus()
        Get current function status.
        Since:
        5

      • getCurrentVersion

        @NonNull
 @RequiresPermission(value="ecarx.openapi.permission.ACCESS_OTA")
default VersionInfo getCurrentVersion()
        Returns current version.
        Since:
        5

      • getTargetVersion

        @Nullable
 @RequiresPermission(value="ecarx.openapi.permission.ACCESS_OTA")
default VersionInfo getTargetVersion()
        Returns an updated version. If there is no new version, returns null.
        Since:
        5

      • requestHistoryVersionInfo

        @RequiresPermission(value="ecarx.openapi.permission.ACCESS_OTA")
default boolean requestHistoryVersionInfo()
        Request the list of history version info VersionListener.onHistoryVersionInfo(List).
        Since:
        11

      • registerVersionListener

        @RequiresPermission(value="ecarx.openapi.permission.ACCESS_OTA")
default boolean registerVersionListener(@NonNull
                                                                                                         VersionListener listener)
        Register an observer to obtain version change event.
        Since:
        5

      • unregisterVersionListener

        @RequiresPermission(value="ecarx.openapi.permission.ACCESS_OTA")
default void unregisterVersionListener(@NonNull
                                                                                                        VersionListener listener)
        Unregister the observer.
        Since:
        5

      • setUpdateTaskUuid

        @RequiresPermission(value="ecarx.openapi.permission.ACCESS_OTA")
default void setUpdateTaskUuid(@NonNull
                                                                                                java.lang.String taskUuid)
        Set the UUID for this update task.
        Since:
        11

      • checkVersionUpdate

        @RequiresPermission(value="ecarx.openapi.permission.ACCESS_OTA")
default void checkVersionUpdate()
        Homepage check for version updates. #VersionListener.onTargetVersionReceived(VersionInfo)
        Since:
        13

      • getCurrentVersion

        default void getCurrentVersion(BaseCallBack<VersionInfo> callback)
        Async get current version.
        Since:
        13

      • getHistoryVersionDetailInfo

        default void getHistoryVersionDetailInfo(java.lang.String versionName,
                                         BaseCallBack<VersionInfo> callback)
        Async get single historical version details.
        Since:
        13

      • getDownloadManager

        @NonNull
default IOtaDownload getDownloadManager()
        Returns a manager used to accessing ota download functionality.
        Since:
        5

      • getInstallManager

        @NonNull
default IOtaInstall getInstallManager()
        Returns a manager used to accessing ota install functionality.
        Since:
        5

      • getRepairInstallManager

        @NonNull
default IOtaInstallErrorRepair getRepairInstallManager()
        Returns a manager used to repair error of ota install.
        Since:
        11
